description: State after applyPreset(-1) — Init preset with default lanes

presets.name: Four on the Floor
presets.description: Classic club groove with straight 8th hats and polymetric open hat

presets.name: Polymetric Drift
presets.description: Prime-number cycles (3, 5, 7, 11) creating evolving phase patterns

presets.name: Sparse Pulse
presets.description: Minimal, spacious groove with wide spacing and gentle ghost notes

presets.name: Breakbeat
presets.description: Syncopated kick with punchy snare, fast hats and ghost toms

presets.name: Latin Feel
presets.description: Clave-inspired pattern with conga, shaker and cowbell ornaments

presets.name: Afro-House Phrases
presets.description: Offset phrase loops — shaker continuous, conga and djembe breathe on staggered cycles

presets.name: Reich Phasing
presets.description: Two identical patterns gradually phase apart creating emergent resultant rhythms

presets.name: Kotekan Interlock
presets.description: Balinese interlocking pair — polos and sangsih fill each other's gaps

presets.name: Pocket Groove
presets.description: J Dilla-style micro-timing — kick pushes late, snare pulls early, gentle mutation

presets.name: Afrobeat 12/8
presets.description: Compound-time groove with timeline bell pattern, four-on-the-floor kick and conga ghosts

presets.name: Balkan Aksak
presets.description: 7/8 aksak [2+2+3] additive cells — davul, rim, zurna and darbuka

presets.name: Bossa Nova
presets.description: Clave timeline with ginga micro-timing — surdo, tamborim, agogo and pandeiro

presets.name: Carnatic Tala
presets.description: Adi tala [4+2+2] additive cells — mridangam, ghatam and kanjira

presets.name: IDM Glitch
presets.description: Irregular additive cells with heavy mutation and erratic micro-timing offsets
